message:
chore(migrate): remove dead BatchExt import after execute_batch promotion

Drop unused `use crate::compat::BatchExt` from apply_one_inner now
that Connection has a native execute_batch method. The
conn.execute_batch(migration.up_sql) call resolves to the core method
directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
